classes.name: prvCopyDataFromQueue
classes.description: Copy one item out of the queue's storage into the receiver's buffer, advancing the read pointer.
classes.signature: static void prvCopyDataFromQueue( Queue_t * const pxQueue, void * const pvBuffer ) PRIVILEGED_FUNCTION; #if ( configUSE_QUEUE_SETS == 1 ) /* * Checks to see if a queue is a member of a queue set, and if so, notifies * the queue set that the queue contains data. */ static BaseType_t prvNotifyQueueSetContainer( const Queue_t * const pxQueue ) PRIVILEGED_FUNCTION; #endif /* * Called after a Queue_t structure has been allocated either statically or * dynamically to fill in the structure's members. */ static void prvInitialiseNewQueue( const UBaseType_t uxQueueLength, const UBaseType_t uxItemSize, uint8_t * pucQueueStorage, const uint8_t ucQueueType, Queue_t * pxNewQueue ) PRIVILEGED_FUNCTION; /* * Mutexes are a special type of queue. When a mutex is created, first the * queue is created, then prvInitialiseMutex() is called to configure the queue * as a mutex. */ #if ( configUSE_MUTEXES == 1 ) static void prvInitialiseMutex( Queue_t * pxNewQueue ) PRIVILEGED_FUNCTION; #endif #if ( configUSE_MUTEXES == 1 ) /* * If a task waiting for a mutex causes the mutex holder to inherit a * priority, but the waiting task times out, then the holder should * disinherit the priority - but only down to the highest priority of any * other tasks that are waiting for the same mutex. classes.description_en: The timer-task loop body: process the next timer if due, otherwise block the daemon task until the next expiry or an incoming command.

classes.name: prvGetNextExpireTime
classes.signature: static TickType_t prvGetNextExpireTime( BaseType_t * const pxListWasEmpty )

classes.name: prvSampleTimeNow
classes.description: Read the current tick count, detecting tick overflow and switching the current/overflow timer lists when it wraps.
classes.signature: static TickType_t prvSampleTimeNow( BaseType_t * const pxTimerListsWereSwitched )
classes.description_zh: 读取当前节拍，检测节拍计数溢出并在回绕时切换当前/溢出定时器链表
classes.description_en: Read the current tick count, detecting tick overflow and switching the current/overflow timer lists when it wraps.

classes.name: prvInsertTimerInActiveList
classes.description: Insert a timer into the current or overflow active list by expiry time, or flag it for immediate processing if already due.
classes.signature: static BaseType_t prvInsertTimerInActiveList( Timer_t * const pxTimer, const TickType_t xNextExpiryTime, const TickType_t xTimeNow, const TickType_t xCommandTime )
classes.description_zh: 按到期时间将定时器插入当前或溢出链表，若已到期则标记立即处理
classes.description_en: Insert a timer into the current or overflow active list by expiry time, or flag it for immediate processing if already due.

classes.name: prvProcessReceivedCommands
classes.description: Drain the command queue, applying start/stop/reset/change-period commands and executing pended function calls.
classes.description_zh: 处理命令队列中的启动/停止/复位/改周期命令并执行挂起的函数调用
classes.description_en: Drain the command queue, applying start/stop/reset/change-period commands and executing pended function calls.

classes.name: prvSwitchTimerLists
classes.description: On tick overflow, process any timers left in the current list, then swap it with the overflow list.
classes.description_zh: 节拍溢出时处理当前链表中剩余的到期定时器，再与溢出链表互换
classes.description_en: On tick overflow, process any timers left in the current list, then swap it with the overflow list.

classes.name: prvCheckForValidListAndQueue
classes.description: Lazily create the active timer lists and the command queue the first time a timer is used.
classes.description_zh: 首次使用定时器时惰性创建活动链表与命令队列
classes.description_en: Lazily create the active timer lists and the command queue the first time a timer is used.

classes.name: vTimerSetTimerID
classes.signature: void vTimerSetTimerID( TimerHandle_t xTimer, void * pvNewID )

classes.name: xTimerPendFunctionCallFromISR
classes.signature: BaseType_t xTimerPendFunctionCallFromISR( PendedFunction_t xFunctionToPend, void * pvParameter1, uint32_t ulParameter2, BaseType_t * pxHigherPriorityTaskWoken )

classes.signature: BaseType_t xTimerPendFunctionCall( PendedFunction_t xFunctionToPend, void * pvParameter1, uint32_t ulParameter2, TickType_t xTicksToWait )

classes.name: vTimerSetTimerNumber
classes.signature: void vTimerSetTimerNumber( TimerHandle_t xTimer, UBaseType_t uxTimerNumber )

layers.name: Co-routines
layers.summary: Optional, legacy stackless co-routines for extremely RAM-constrained devices — a lightweight alternative to full tasks.

classes.name: xCoRoutineCreate
classes.signature: BaseType_t xCoRoutineCreate( crCOROUTINE_CODE pxCoRoutineCode, UBaseType_t uxPriority, UBaseType_t uxIndex )

classes.name: vCoRoutineAddToDelayedList
classes.description: Add a co-routine to the delayed list for a timed block, optionally also onto an event list.
classes.signature: void vCoRoutineAddToDelayedList( TickType_t xTicksToDelay, List_t * pxEventList )
classes.description_zh: 将协程加入延时链表以定时阻塞，可同时挂到事件链表
classes.description_en: Add a co-routine to the delayed list for a timed block, optionally also onto an event list.

classes.name: xCoRoutineRemoveFromEventList
classes.description: On an event, move the highest-priority waiting co-routine off its event list and back to ready.
classes.description_zh: 事件发生时将等待中的最高优先级协程移回就绪链表
classes.description_en: On an event, move the highest-priority waiting co-routine off its event list and back to ready.

layers.name: Heap Management
layers.summary: Pluggable kernel heap allocators (heap_1..heap_5) implementing pvPortMalloc/vPortFree with different fragmentation, coalescence and multi-region trade-offs.

classes.name: pvPortMalloc
classes.description: heap_1: the simplest allocator — carve memory from a static array, with no support for freeing.
classes.description_zh: heap_1：最简分配器，从静态数组中切分内存，只分配从不释放
classes.description_en: heap_1: the simplest allocator — carve memory from a static array, with no support for freeing.

classes.name: pvPortMalloc
classes.description: heap_2: allocate using a best-fit free list; supports freeing but does not coalesce adjacent free blocks.
classes.description_zh: heap_2：以最佳匹配空闲表分配，支持释放但不合并相邻空闲块
classes.description_en: heap_2: allocate using a best-fit free list; supports freeing but does not coalesce adjacent free blocks.

classes.name: vPortFree
classes.description: heap_2: return a block to the free list without merging neighbours (prone to fragmentation).
classes.description_zh: heap_2：将内存块放回空闲表，不合并相邻块（易碎片化）
classes.description_en: heap_2: return a block to the free list without merging neighbours (prone to fragmentation).

classes.name: pvPortCalloc
classes.signature: void * pvPortCalloc( size_t xNum, size_t xSize )

classes.name: pvPortMalloc
classes.description: heap_3: a thread-safe wrapper around the standard C library malloc, guarded by suspending the scheduler.
classes.description_zh: heap_3：封装标准库 malloc，并通过挂起调度器保证线程安全
classes.description_en: heap_3: a thread-safe wrapper around the standard C library malloc, guarded by suspending the scheduler.

classes.name: vPortFree
classes.description: heap_3: call the standard C library free under scheduler-lock protection.
classes.description_zh: heap_3：在调度器锁保护下调用标准库 free
classes.description_en: heap_3: call the standard C library free under scheduler-lock protection.

classes.name: pvPortMalloc
classes.description: heap_4: first-fit allocation that coalesces adjacent free blocks — the general-purpose default that minimises fragmentation.
classes.description_zh: heap_4：首次匹配分配并合并相邻空闲块，是抑制碎片的通用默认分配器
classes.description_en: heap_4: first-fit allocation that coalesces adjacent free blocks — the general-purpose default that minimises fragmentation.

classes.name: vPortFree
classes.description: heap_4: free a block and merge it with adjacent free blocks to reduce fragmentation.
classes.description_zh: heap_4：释放内存块并与相邻空闲块合并以减少碎片
classes.description_en: heap_4: free a block and merge it with adjacent free blocks to reduce fragmentation.

classes.name: pvPortCalloc
classes.signature: void * pvPortCalloc( size_t xNum, size_t xSize )

classes.name: prvInsertBlockIntoFreeList
classes.signature: static void prvInsertBlockIntoFreeList( BlockLink_t * pxBlockToInsert ) /* PRIVILEGED_FUNCTION */

classes.name: vPortGetHeapStats
classes.description: Return heap_4 usage statistics: free bytes, largest/smallest free block, and allocation counts.
classes.description_zh: 返回 heap_4 的堆使用统计（空闲字节、最大/最小空闲块、分配次数）
classes.description_en: Return heap_4 usage statistics: free bytes, largest/smallest free block, and allocation counts.

classes.name: vPortDefineHeapRegions
classes.signature: static void prvInsertBlockIntoFreeList( BlockLink_t * pxBlockToInsert ) PRIVILEGED_FUNCTION; void vPortDefineHeapRegions( const HeapRegion_t * const pxHeapRegions ) PRIVILEGED_FUNCTION; #if ( configENABLE_HEAP_PROTECTOR == 1 ) /** * @brief Application provided function to get a random value to be used as canary. * * @param pxHeapCanary [out] Output parameter to return the canary value. */ extern void vApplicationGetRandomHeapCanary( portPOINTER_SIZE_TYPE * pxHeapCanary ); #endif /* configENABLE_HEAP_PROTECTOR */ /*-----------------------------------------------------------*/ /* The size of the structure placed at the beginning of each allocated memory * block must by correctly byte aligned. */ static const size_t xHeapStructSize = ( sizeof( BlockLink_t ) + ( ( size_t ) ( portBYTE_ALIGNMENT - 1 ) ) ) & ~( ( size_t ) portBYTE_ALIGNMENT_MASK ); /* Create a couple of list links to mark the start and end of the list. */ PRIVILEGED_DATA static BlockLink_t xStart; PRIVILEGED_DATA static BlockLink_t * pxEnd = NULL; /* Keeps track of the number of calls to allocate and free memory as well as the * number of free bytes remaining, but says nothing about fragmentation. */ PRIVILEGED_DATA static size_t xFreeBytesRemaining = ( size_t ) 0U; PRIVILEGED_DATA static size_t xMinimumEverFreeBytesRemaining = ( size_t ) 0U; PRIVILEGED_DATA static size_t xNumberOfSuccessfulAllocations = ( size_t ) 0U; PRIVILEGED_DATA static size_t xNumberOfSuccessfulFrees = ( size_t ) 0U; #if ( configENABLE_HEAP_PROTECTOR == 1 ) /* Canary value for protecting internal heap pointers. */ PRIVILEGED_DATA static portPOINTER_SIZE_TYPE xHeapCanary; /* Highest and lowest heap addresses used for heap block bounds checking. */ PRIVILEGED_DATA static uint8_t * pucHeapHighAddress = NULL; PRIVILEGED_DATA static uint8_t * pucHeapLowAddress = NULL; #endif /* configENABLE_HEAP_PROTECTOR */ /*-----------------------------------------------------------*/ void * pvPortMalloc( size_t xWantedSize )

classes.name: vPortFree
classes.description: heap_5: free-and-coalesce for the multi-region allocator that spans several non-contiguous memory blocks.
classes.description_zh: heap_5：释放并合并，面向跨多个非连续内存区的分配器
classes.description_en: heap_5: free-and-coalesce for the multi-region allocator that spans several non-contiguous memory blocks.

classes.name: pvPortCalloc
classes.signature: void * pvPortCalloc( size_t xNum, size_t xSize )

classes.name: prvInsertBlockIntoFreeList
classes.signature: static void prvInsertBlockIntoFreeList( BlockLink_t * pxBlockToInsert ) /* PRIVILEGED_FUNCTION */

layers.name: Port / HAL
layers.summary: The portability boundary: architecture/compiler-specific context switch, tick setup and stack init, plus the MPU wrappers that gate kernel calls for memory-protected builds.

classes.name: pxPortInitialiseStack
classes.signature: StackType_t * pxPortInitialiseStack( StackType_t * pxTopOfStack, TaskFunction_t pxCode, void * pvParameters )

classes.name: xPortStartScheduler
classes.description: ARM Cortex-M4F: configure the SysTick tick interrupt, enable the FPU, and start the first task — begins multitasking.
classes.description_zh: ARM Cortex-M4F：配置 SysTick 节拍中断、使能 FPU，并启动首个任务（开始多任务）
classes.description_en: ARM Cortex-M4F: configure the SysTick tick interrupt, enable the FPU, and start the first task — begins multitasking.

classes.name: prvGetThreadFromTask
classes.description: Retrieve the underlying pthread thread object associated with a FreeRTOS task handle.
classes.signature: static inline Thread_t * prvGetThreadFromTask( TaskHandle_t xTask )
classes.description_zh: 从 FreeRTOS 任务句柄取出其底层 pthread 线程结构
classes.description_en: Retrieve the underlying pthread thread object associated with a FreeRTOS task handle.

classes.name: prvIsFreeRTOSThread
classes.description: Test whether the calling pthread is one managed by the FreeRTOS POSIX port.
classes.description_zh: 判断当前 pthread 是否为受 FreeRTOS 管理的线程
classes.description_en: Test whether the calling pthread is one managed by the FreeRTOS POSIX port.

classes.name: prvFatalError
classes.signature: void prvFatalError( const char * pcCall, int iErrno )

classes.name: prvPortSetCurrentThreadName
classes.description: Set the host thread name of the current pthread to match its FreeRTOS task name, for debugging.
classes.signature: static void prvPortSetCurrentThreadName( const char * pxThreadName )
classes.description_zh: 将当前 pthread 的线程名设置为对应任务名，便于调试
classes.description_en: Set the host thread name of the current pthread to match its FreeRTOS task name, for debugging.

classes.name: pxPortInitialiseStack
classes.signature: StackType_t * pxPortInitialiseStack( StackType_t * pxTopOfStack, StackType_t * pxEndOfStack, TaskFunction_t pxCode, void * pvParameters )

classes.name: vPortStartFirstTask
classes.description: Start the first task by resuming its corresponding pthread, kicking off the simulated scheduler.
classes.description_zh: 恢复首个任务对应的 pthread，启动模拟调度器
classes.description_en: Start the first task by resuming its corresponding pthread, kicking off the simulated scheduler.

classes.name: vPortEnterCritical
classes.description: Enter a critical section by blocking signals — the host-simulation equivalent of disabling interrupts.
classes.description_zh: 进入临界区：屏蔽信号，等价于在主机模拟环境下关中断
classes.description_en: Enter a critical section by blocking signals — the host-simulation equivalent of disabling interrupts.

classes.name: vPortExitCritical
classes.description: Leave a critical section, re-enabling signals once the nesting count returns to zero.
classes.description_zh: 退出临界区：嵌套归零时恢复信号
classes.description_en: Leave a critical section, re-enabling signals once the nesting count returns to zero.

classes.name: prvPortYieldFromISR
classes.description: Trigger a context switch from within a signal handler — the port's simulated ISR-level yield.
classes.description_zh: 在信号处理（模拟 ISR）中触发上下文切换
classes.description_en: Trigger a context switch from within a signal handler — the port's simulated ISR-level yield.

classes.name: vPortEnableInterrupts
classes.description: Unblock signals to re-enable the simulated interrupts.
classes.description_zh: 解除信号屏蔽，等价于开中断
classes.description_en: Unblock signals to re-enable the simulated interrupts.

classes.name: vPortSystemTickHandler
classes.description: The SIGALRM handler: advance the FreeRTOS tick and, if due, switch to the next task’s pthread — the simulated tick interrupt.
classes.description_zh: SIGALRM 信号处理：推进 FreeRTOS 节拍，到期则切换到下一任务的线程（模拟节拍中断）
classes.description_en: The SIGALRM handler: advance the FreeRTOS tick and, if due, switch to the next task’s pthread — the simulated tick interrupt.

classes.name: vPortThreadDying
classes.signature: void vPortThreadDying( void * pxTaskToDelete, volatile BaseType_t * pxPendYield )

classes.name: prvWaitForStart
classes.description: Entry routine of each task's pthread — wait to be resumed for the first time, then call the task's code.
classes.description_zh: 每个任务 pthread 的入口：等待首次被恢复后调用任务函数
classes.description_en: Entry routine of each task's pthread — wait to be resumed for the first time, then call the task's code.

classes.name: prvSwitchThread
classes.description: Perform a context switch by resuming the incoming task’s thread and suspending the current one, preserving per-task critical nesting.
classes.signature: static void prvSwitchThread( Thread_t * pxThreadToResume, Thread_t * pxThreadToSuspend )
classes.description_zh: 通过恢复目标任务线程、挂起自身实现上下文切换，并保存每任务的临界嵌套计数
classes.description_en: Perform a context switch by resuming the incoming task’s thread and suspending the current one, preserving per-task critical nesting.

classes.name: main
classes.description: Example application entry point — create a task and start the scheduler, demonstrating canonical kernel usage.
classes.description_zh: 示例程序入口：创建任务并启动调度器，演示内核的典型用法
classes.description_en: Example application entry point — create a task and start the scheduler, demonstrating canonical kernel usage.

classes.name: vApplicationStackOverflowHook
classes.signature: void vApplicationStackOverflowHook( TaskHandle_t xTask, char * pcTaskName )

flows.name: 应用启动与调度器初始化 / Application Startup & Scheduler Init
flows.description: 示例 main 创建任务并调用 vTaskStartScheduler，内核随之建立空闲/定时器任务与就绪链表 / The example main creates a task and calls vTaskStartScheduler, which spins up the idle and timer tasks and the ready lists.

flows.name: 信号量获取与优先级继承 / Semaphore Take & Priority Inheritance
flows.description: 获取信号量或互斥量；互斥量被占用时阻塞并对持有者施加优先级继承，以抑制优先级反转 / Take a semaphore or mutex, blocking when held and applying priority inheritance to the holder to bound priority inversion.

flows.name: 队列接收与阻塞 / Queue Receive & Block
flows.description: 从队列取出数据；队列空时按优先级阻塞在事件链表并设超时，发送方到来时被唤醒 / Copy an item out of the queue, or block on the event list with a timeout when empty until a sender wakes the receiver.

flows.name: 事件组等待位 / Event Group Wait Bits
flows.description: 阻塞在无序事件链表上，直到事件组中指定的位组合被置位 / Block on the unordered event list until the requested combination of bits becomes set in the event group.

flows.name: 流缓冲发送 / Stream Buffer Send
flows.description: 向环形流缓冲写入字节，空间不足时阻塞，达到触发水平后唤醒接收任务 / Write bytes into the ring buffer, blocking until space frees, and wake the receiver once the trigger level is reached.

flows.name: 启动调度器与首个任务 (Cortex-M) / Start Scheduler & First Task (Cortex-M)
flows.description: Cortex-M4F 端口配置 SysTick 与 FPU，经 SVC 启动首个任务，之后由 PendSV 驱动上下文切换 / The Cortex-M4F port sets up SysTick and the FPU, launches the first task via SVC, then drives later context switches from PendSV.

flows.name: 任务删除 / Task Delete
flows.description: 将任务移出所有链表并回收资源；自删除任务的栈延后由空闲任务清理 / Remove a task from every list and reclaim its memory, deferring a self-deleting task’s stack cleanup to the idle task.

flows.name: 队列发送 / Queue Send
flows.description: 将数据拷入队列；队列满时阻塞等待空间，写入后唤醒等待接收的最高优先级任务 / Copy an item into the queue, blocking when full until space frees, then unblock the highest-priority waiting receiver.

flows.name: 任务延时阻塞 / Task Delay & Block
flows.description: 在调度器锁保护下将当前任务按唤醒时间移入延时链表，节拍到期后由节拍处理解除阻塞 / Under a scheduler lock, move the current task into the delayed list by wake time; the tick handler unblocks it when the delay expires.
